ResizeBlb.blbId: The identifier of the Load Balancer
ResizeBlb.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
ResizeBlb.performanceLevel: Performance specification. Valid values: "small1" Standard 1, "small2" Standard 2, "medium1" Enhanced 1, "medium2" Enhanced 2, "large1" Ultra-large 1, "large2" Ultra-large 2, "large3" Ultra-large 3. Only pay-as-you-go instances support resizing to "unlimited" (no bandwidth limit).
